title: Rusticl KGSL — Decision Gate: GPU Compute Not Executing
summary: Full OpenCL 3.1 API pipeline works through GPU_COMMAND ioctl, but GPU does not execute compute shaders. Command buffer accepted by kernel but results never visible in memory. This is a fundamental Gallium KGSL backend limitation for compute workloads.
evidence_chain: GPU_COMMAND ioctl: ✓ (ret=0, ts=1, accepted by kernel)
GPU execution: ✗ (buffer data unchanged after kernel dispatch)
USE_HOST_PTR test: host_buf remains 0xFFFFFFFF (never written by GPU)
Multiple buffer strategies tested (COPY_HOST_PTR, ALLOC_HOST_PTR, USE_HOST_PTR) — all same result

root_cause_analysis.hypothesis: freedreno Gallium KGSL command buffer format is incomplete for compute dispatch
details: fd6_launch_grid generates compute dispatch PM4 commands into ringbuffer
Ringbuffer submitted via IOCTL_KGSL_GPU_COMMAND with KGSL_CMDLIST_IB
But GPU either: (a) silently drops malformed IBs, (b) writes to wrong iova, (c) compute shader addresses don't match BO iovas in KGSL mode
Turnip (Vulkan) uses completely different submit path with proper BO tracking, fences, and syncobjs
Gallium KGSL backend was designed for freedreno GL (draw calls) not compute
root_cause_analysis.fix_complexity: HIGH — requires deep PM4 command buffer debugging, likely BO iova registration issues or missing CP_SET_MARKER/CP_MEM_WRITE commands for compute

final_verdict.rusticl_on_kgsl: NOT_VIABLE for compute without significant GPU command buffer work
final_verdict.rusticl: FORMALLY CLOSED as research_only — proven to architectural limit

patches_delivered.42R: GPU submit path (deferred submit fix + blit transfer disable)
